title: "Detection of mycotoxigenic species in plant samples with the portable qPCR Q3 device"
author: Cereda, Marco
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This presentation is part of the Capacity building Materials produced during the WP3 participatory workshop (Task 6.4), held in Kenya in October 2022. 
 It contains an overview of the research advances and functioning of the use of portable qPCR Q3 device to detect mycotoxigenic species in plant samples, developed by ST-I Microelectronics in collabotation with the University of Sassary (UNISS) within the Task 3. 2 of the EU H2020 EWABELT Project (G.A. 862848). 
   
 



 Files
